articles.author: Andy Greenberg
articles.title: Hundreds of Millions of iPhones Can Be Hacked With a New Tool Found in the Wild - WIRED
articles.description: A powerful iPhone-hacking technique known as DarkSword has been discovered in use by Russian hackers. It can take over devices running iOS 18 that simply visit infected websites.
articles.content: iPhone hacking techniques have sometimes been described almost like rare and elusive animals: Hackers have used them so stealthily and carefully against such a small number of hand-picked targets tha… [+3825 chars]

articles.author: Richard Lawler
articles.title: DLSS 5: Has Nvidia’s AI graphics technology gone too far? - The Verge
articles.description: Nvidia’s new DLSS 5 technology uses AI to “achieve photorealism” by adjusting a game’s look in real-time, but so far a lot of gamers don’t like it.
articles.content: Nvidia has revealed a new 3D guided neural rendering model called DLSS 5 that can change a games lighting and materials in real-time, and many gamers arent happy. From DLSS 5 memes to complaints abou… [+2814 chars]

articles.description: ASUS TUF Gaming A16, F16, A18 laptops for 2026: Featuring stunning OLED/300Hz anti-reflection displays, Intel Core Ultra 9, AMD Ryzen 9, and NVIDIA RTX 5070 Ti for elite gaming. Subscribe to ASUS Pressroom for the latest tech updates!
